assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The response includes both Terraform configuration with recurring_window using 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' and gcloud commands with maintenance-window-recurrence for Saturday-Sunday windows

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The bash script includes gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start '2024-01-06T02:00:00Z', --maintenance-window-end '2024-01-07T06:00:00Z', and --maintenance-window-recurrence 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA'

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The response includes quarterly_exclusions in Terraform with specific date ranges for each quarter (Q1-Q4) and corresponding gcloud commands with add_quarterly_exclusions function

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The response includes audit_exclusions in Terraform for the entire November period and a dedicated add_audit_exclusion function with gcloud commands for November 1-30

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods that exceed this limit

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and auto-upgrades or clarify that maintenance windows only apply to automatic upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response uses 'REGULAR' release channel in Terraform but does not recommend Stable or Extended channels for better upgrade control in regulated environments

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The bash script includes gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, --add-maintenance-exclusion-end, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for all exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about version drift risks or the potential security/supportability issues of falling behind on Kubernetes versions during extended exclusion periods
